source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/10_자사 품질 매뉴얼, 절차서/AQP402 QMS Software Validation 규정/AQP402_QMS Software Validation 규정_양식_2024.04.01.xlsx

document.title: AQP402 QMS Software Validation 규정 양식

sourceSummary.oneLine: QMS Software Validation 계획서, 보고서, 소프트웨어 등록대장 양식의 문서번호, 개정번호, 개정일 및 적용 요구사항을 제시한다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: QMS 소프트웨어 검증 계획, 검증 보고 및 소프트웨어 등록 관리를 위한 내부 품질 양식으로 사용된다.
keyPoints: QMS Software Validation 계획서 문서 번호는 402-1이며 REV.00이다.
QMS Software Validation 보고서 문서 번호는 402-2이며 REV.00이다.
개정 이력은 2024.04.01 전면 개정으로, KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 요구사항을 언급한다.

entities.name: KGMP
entities.evidence: KGMP, ISO 13485:2016(EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 요구사항

concepts.name: Medical Device Quality Management Requirements
concepts.pageTarget: Medical Device Quality Management System Requirements
concepts.evidence: KGMP, ISO 13485:2016(EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 요구사항에 따른 전면 개정

evidence.claim: The QMS Software Validation plan form has document number 402-1 and revision 0.
evidence.evidenceText: QMS Software Validation 계획서 ... 문서 번호 402-1 ... 개정 번호 0

evidence.claim: The QMS Software Validation report form has document number 402-2 and revision 0.
evidence.evidenceText: QMS Software Validation 보고서 ... 문서 번호 402-2 ... 개정 번호 0

evidence.claim: The software register form has document number 402-3 and revision 0.
evidence.evidenceText: 소프트웨어 등록대장 ... 문서 번호 402-3 ... 개정 번호 0

evidence.claim: The listed revision date for the forms is 2024.04.01.
The revision history states a full revision based on KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: KGMP, ISO 13485:2016(EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021), FDA 21 CFR Part 820, MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 요구사항에 따른 전면 개정
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Device Quality Management System Requirements

evidence.claim: The software register includes fields for management number, software name, manufacturer, license information, product ID, version, website, and remarks.
evidence.evidenceText: 관리번호, 소프트웨어 명칭, 제조업체, 라이센스정보, 제품 ID, VER, 홈페이지, 비고

reviewFlags.reason: Product models are not present in the source text; productSignal is Unclassified.
Authority signal is FDA, but the source text cites multiple requirement sources: KGMP, ISO 13485, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10.
The source contains approval/signature date text '12/1/23' in addition to the revision date 2024.04.01; its meaning is not clearly defined.
